name: space_analysis_find_ceiling_void_above_point
desc: Vertical raycast from a point. Returns the first ceiling-z plus the first structural obstruction (slab/beam/roof) above it, with the void height in mm.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: X of the point in feet (world coordinates).

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: Y of the point in feet.

parameters.name: z
parameters.description: Z of the point in feet — start height of the ray.

parameters.name: max_distance_ft
parameters.description: Optional max cast distance in feet. Default 100 ft.

keywords: space analysis find ceiling void above point
how tall is the ceiling void
